title: Classic American Cornbread Casserole
description: A comforting twist on traditional cornbread, this casserole is perfect for a weeknight dinner. The rich flavors of roasted corn and savory cornbread come together in a harmonious blend.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together cornbread mix, eggs, milk, and melted butter.
Stir in 1/2 cup of shredded cheddar cheese and 1 cup of roasted corn.
Pour mixture into a greased 9x13-inch baking dish.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Sprinkle remaining 1/2 cup of shredded cheddar cheese on top of the casserole and return to oven for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
